summary: Interactive data review session. Explored acquirer/leadership/broker relationships. Identified 6 issues (Calendly classification, Jeffrey Botteron name, Ivor/Vir Handshake links, Ray angle_strategy, Future Fit missing). Created Wave 3 plan with 2 worker briefs for process documentation and data remediation.
learnings: Vir and Ivor are distinct contacts both leading to Handshake. Ray's Notion angle_strategy may be stale (meeting was about Calendly). Future Fit opportunity via Hamoon flagged calendar integration gap.
concerns: Calendar→deal integration is a recurring gap. Process documentation (W3.1) must precede data fixes (W3.2) to establish consistent classification rules.
notes_for_orchestrator: Wave 3 ready. Execute W3.1 first (process rules), then W3.2 (data fixes). Hamoon/Future Fit meeting Tuesday - consider calendar integration enhancement in future wave.
